sections.overview: The National Talent Scholarship (NTS) is implemented by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) to support students pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Agriculture and allied disciplines. It is awarded to students admitted through the All India Entrance Examination (AIEE) and studying in an ICAR-funded Agricultural University outside their State of domicile.
sections.objective: The scheme aims to support meritorious students by providing financial assistance during undergraduate studies and promoting higher agricultural education.
eligibility: Student pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Agriculture or allied disciplines
Admission secured through All India Entrance Examination (AIEE)
Enrolled in an Agricultural University outside the State of domicile
University must be funded under ICAR scheme for agricultural education
benefits: Scholarship of ₹3,000 per month during the Bachelor's degree programme
application_process: Visit National Scholarship Portal https://scholarships.gov.in/otrapplication/#/ and register
Complete mobile verification and e-KYC process
Generate OTR using NSP OTR app and Aadhaar FaceRD app
Fill application form, upload documents, and submit
Track payment status on PFMS portal https://pfms.nic.in/static/NewLayoutCommonContent.aspx?RequestPagename=static/TrackNSPpayments.aspx
documents_required: Other documents as prescribed by ICAR or University

faq.question: Who can apply for the National Talent Scholarship?
faq.answer: Students admitted through AIEE to eligible Agricultural Universities outside their State of domicile can apply.

faq.question: Is admission through AIEE necessary?
faq.answer: Yes, only students admitted through AIEE are eligible.

faq.question: Can students studying in their home State receive the scholarship?
faq.answer: No, the scholarship is only for students studying outside their State of domicile.

faq.question: How long is the scholarship provided?
faq.answer: It is awarded initially for one year and renewed for the duration of the course based on performance.

faq.question: What are the academic requirements for renewal?
faq.answer: Students must maintain required OGPA/CGPA, clear exams, and show satisfactory conduct.

faq.question: Can a student receive another scholarship along with NTS?
faq.answer: No, students cannot receive any other scholarship or financial assistance simultaneously.

faq.question: What happens if a student changes discipline or university?
How is the scholarship amount disbursed?
faq.answer: It is credited to the student's Aadhaar-linked bank account through DBT.

faq.question: Under what circumstances can the scholarship be discontinued?
faq.answer: It may be discontinued due to poor performance, indiscipline, change of course, or receiving another scholarship.

faq.question: What happens if a student withdraws from the course?
faq.answer: The scholarship will be stopped and may need to be refunded as per ICAR rules.
